evals.prompt: I need to investigate john.smith@contoso.com on Fluency — can you pull their O365 activity for the last 7 days and tell me what they've been up to? I'm trying to figure out if there's anything suspicious going on with their account after we got an alert.
evals.expected_output: The skill should (1) call list_reports and verify all 3 required reports exist, (2) run all 3 reports for the username with from/to timestamps covering the last 7 days, (3) produce a single HTML report with a timeline SVG, KPI strip, summary paragraph, 3 data tables, and recommendations. The HTML file should be linkable via computer:// URL.
expectations: The skill calls list_reports before running any report
All three reports (GetDirectoryChangesInitiatedByUser, GetDirectoryChangesTargetingUser, GetUserSigninHistory) are run
The output is an HTML file saved to disk
The HTML contains a timeline section with SVG
The HTML contains a summary paragraph
The HTML contains tables for all three reports
The HTML contains a Recommended Next Steps section
A computer:// link to the HTML file is provided in chat

evals.prompt: Hey can you check what jane.doe@corp.com did in Office365 yesterday? Specifically I want to know if she made any directory changes or had unusual sign-ins. Run the investigation on Fluency.
evals.expected_output: The skill should collect the username (jane.doe@corp.com) and interpret 'yesterday' as the 24-hour window for the previous day, then run the same three reports and produce the HTML investigation report with all required sections.
expectations: The time range covers approximately the last 24 hours
The username jane.doe@corp.com is passed to all three reports
An HTML file is produced with timeline, tables, summary, and recommendations

evals.prompt: Run an O365 user investigation on Fluency. The user is bob@example.com and I want to look at the last 30 days.
evals.expected_output: The skill should verify the 3 required reports exist, then run them for bob@example.com over the last 30 days, producing the combined HTML report with timeline, KPI strip, 3 data tables, executive summary, and prioritised recommendations. If any required report is missing, the skill should stop and clearly state which report is absent.
expectations: list_reports is called to verify required reports
All three required reports are run with bob@example.com as the username
The time range covers approximately 30 days
The HTML output contains all five sections: KPI strip, timeline, summary, three data tables, next steps
A computer:// link is shared in chat
